title: Recurrent Sinusoidal INRs for Efficient High-Fidelity Representation
innovation_summary: Recurrent Sinusoidal INRs for Efficient High-Fidelity Representation: We study sinusoidal recurrence as an iterative mechanism for harmonic spectral enrichment in implicit neural representations (INRs).
